home.heroTitle: Growing Pakistan's Future, One Seed at a Time
home.heroSubtitle: MRS Agro Chemicals brings you premium quality seeds trusted by farmers across the country.
home.introText: We are committed to delivering high-yield, disease-resistant seed varieties backed by agricultural expertise and a nationwide franchise network.

about.heading: Our Story
about.paragraph1: At MRS Agro Chemicals, we believe that the foundation of a bountiful harvest lies in the quality of the seed. For years, we have dedicated ourselves to supplying Pakistan's farmers with premium, high-yield seed varieties that they can trust season after season.
about.paragraph2: Backed by decades of agricultural expertise and a deep understanding of Pakistan's diverse growing conditions, we work tirelessly to bring innovation to every field. Our commitment extends beyond seeds — we partner with farmers to ensure they get the support and guidance needed to thrive.
about.value1Text: Every seed we supply undergoes rigorous testing to ensure germination rates, disease resistance, and adaptability to local climates.
about.value2Text: We prioritise the needs of the farmer, offering expert guidance and responsive support at every step of the growing season.
about.value3Text: With franchise partners across Pakistan, we make quality seeds and agricultural expertise accessible to every region.

products.pageSubtitle: Explore our range of premium certified seed varieties, carefully selected for Pakistan's diverse growing regions.

franchise.pageSubtitle: Join MRS Agro Chemicals' growing network of dealers and shop owners across Pakistan. Partner with us to bring premium quality seeds to your local farming community.
franchise.benefit1: Access to certified, high-yield seed varieties that farmers trust and demand, ensuring steady sales and repeat customers.
franchise.benefit2: Comprehensive training, marketing materials, and ongoing support to help you grow your business confidently.
franchise.benefit3: Become part of a respected brand with decades of agricultural expertise and a loyal customer base nationwide.
franchise.formSuccessMessage: Thank you! Your application has been sent. We'll contact you soon.
franchise.formErrorMessage: Something went wrong. Please try again or contact us directly.

contact.pageSubtitle: We'd love to hear from you. Reach out through any of the channels below or send us a message directly.
contact.formSuccessMessage: Message sent successfully! We'll get back to you soon.
contact.formErrorMessage: Failed to send message. Please try again or contact us directly using the details above.
